creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
According to upstream only the support for MySQL 5.5 on FreeBSD is no longer supported. 

When reading your second link carefully there is no clue for an EOL of MySQL 5.5. The last EOL of MySQL was 5.1 in 2013. 5.5 is still supported but not as binary on FreeBSD. This is not a problem since we build it from source.

And as Bernard pointed out: MySQL 5.5 still receives updates, which would not be the case if its EOL.
